title: Ornithia
description: Adds birds, tameable owls, sickles and straw.
body:
**A mod made by Hidroby for his friend, Owl, as a birthday gift.**

------------------------------------------------
## Contents:
-4 different birds with ambient sounds (not counting the owls)

-3 variations of owls depending on the biome they spawn in (tameable)

-A new weapon type: The Sickle
- When pressing shift while hitting an entity with it you can pull the entity slightly                      towards you but this does take away 0.25 hunger bars. (If you don't shift it doesn't)

-Straw which can be obtained by harvesting fully grown wheat with any sickle
- Straw Block which speeds up chickens EggLayTime that are standing on it by 1 each tick (makes it twice as fast)

------------------------------------------------
